## Public-Safety Checklist

- [ ] I did not add credentials, tokens, license files, private paths, provider logs, or private tracker content.
- [ ] I did not add raw cryo-EM movies, maps, half-maps, particle stacks, private structures, unpublished sequences, model weights, or heavy generated outputs.
- [ ] Any scientific claims are claim-leveled and tied to evidence artifacts.
- [ ] Any provider, raw-data, license-gated, or paid-compute path remains operator-gated.

## Validation

make release-check
